category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Qatar market (QGOSM conformity, GSO standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling, and CRA radio approval).

title.en: China-to-Qatar LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入卡塔爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Qatar market-access requirements: QGOSM conformity and registration under MOCI, GSO/IEC lighting safety standards (GSO IEC 60598, GSO IEC 62560, GSO IEC 62471), GSO energy-efficiency labelling, and CRA type approval for smart/wireless luminaires — versus Chinese GB / GB/T standards and CCC certification. Qatar operates at 240 V, 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与卡塔尔市场准入要求差距对照：MOCI 之下的 QGOSM 符合性与注册、GSO/IEC 照明安全标准（GSO IEC 60598、GSO IEC 62560、GSO IEC 62471）、GSO 能效标签，以及智能/无线灯具的 CRA 型号核准——与中国 GB / GB/T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。卡塔尔电网为 240 V、50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與卡塔爾市場准入要求差距對照：MOCI 之下的 QGOSM 符合性與注冊、GSO/IEC 照明安全標準（GSO IEC 60598、GSO IEC 62560、GSO IEC 62471）、GSO 能效標籤，以及智能/無線燈具的 CRA 型號核准——與中國 GB / GB/T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。卡塔爾電網為 240 V、50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Qatar law, QGOSM conformity and registration requirements, applicable GSO and GSO/IEC standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, and CRA radio approval obligations with qualified professionals and a licensed in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及持牌的当地进口商核验现行卡塔尔法律、QGOSM 符合性与注册要求、适用的 GSO 及 GSO/IEC 标准、GSO 能效标签阈值及 CRA 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及持牌的當地進口商核驗現行卡塔爾法律、QGOSM 符合性與注冊要求、適用的 GSO 及 GSO/IEC 標準、GSO 能效標籤閾值及 CRA 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Qatar must meet QGOSM (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology, under MOCI) conformity and registration requirements for regulated products; comply with GSO/IEC lighting safety standards (GSO IEC 60598 for luminaires, GSO IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, GSO IEC 62471 for photobiological safety) rather than the GB/EN equivalents; meet GSO EMC requirements (GSO CISPR 15 family); affix the GSO energy-efficiency label per the GCC energy-efficiency labelling scheme for in-scope lighting products; obtain CRA (Communications Regulatory Authority) type approval for any luminaire with wireless functions; design for a 240 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China, but the 240 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V); and ship through a licensed in-country importer. Qatar has no horizontal RoHS analogous to the EU; hazardous-substance control is addressed through specific GSO substance rules and product safety standards where applicable. None of these are covered by existing CCC certification or China Energy Label registration.
answer_first.zh: 向卡塔尔出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：满足 QGOSM（卡塔尔标准与计量总局，隶属 MOCI）对受管制产品的符合性与注册要求；遵循 GSO/IEC 照明安全标准（灯具用 GSO IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯用 GSO IEC 62560、光生物安全用 GSO IEC 62471），而非 GB/EN 对应标准；满足 GSO EMC 要求（GSO CISPR 15 系列）；对适用范围内的照明产品按海湾能效标签方案贴附 GSO 能效标签；对任何具备无线功能的灯具取得 CRA（通信监管局）型号核准；按 240 V / 50 Hz 电网设计（50 Hz 与中国相同，但 240 V 标称电压不同于中国的 220 V）；并经持牌的当地进口商出货。卡塔尔不设类似欧盟的横向 RoHS；有害物质管控通过适用情况下的特定 GSO 物质规则及产品安全标准处理。上述均不被现有 CCC 认证或中国能效标识注册所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向卡塔爾出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：滿足 QGOSM（卡塔爾標準與計量總局，隸屬 MOCI）對受管制產品的符合性與注冊要求；遵循 GSO/IEC 照明安全標準（燈具用 GSO IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈用 GSO IEC 62560、光生物安全用 GSO IEC 62471），而非 GB/EN 對應標準；滿足 GSO EMC 要求（GSO CISPR 15 系列）；對適用範圍內的照明產品按海灣能效標籤方案貼附 GSO 能效標籤；對任何具備無線功能的燈具取得 CRA（通信監管局）型號核准；按 240 V / 50 Hz 電網設計（50 Hz 與中國相同，但 240 V 標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V）；並經持牌的當地進口商出貨。卡塔爾不設類似歐盟的橫向 RoHS；有害物質管控通過適用情況下的特定 GSO 物質規則及產品安全標準處理。上述均不被現有 CCC 認證或中國能效標識注冊所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon any change to QGOSM conformity rules, GSO/IEC adopted standard editions, GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, or CRA type-approval requirements.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. GSO/IEC standard references and GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds must be re-verified against the current GSO catalogue and QGOSM technical regulations on each review cycle.
